mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, from_user, from_role, type, content, signature, reply_to_id, recalled, recalled_at, recalled_by, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, session_id, from_user, from_role, type, content, signature, reply_to_id, recalled, recalled_at, recalled_by, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND id > #{lastId} AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 100
